data.content: Plan v3 addresses all prior review gaps: (1) Fixes waves route dependency_type bug — line 194 checks dep.dependency_type!='blocks' but listDependencies emits dependency_type='blocked_by', so ALL deps are silently skipped; fix to use dep.type!='blocks'. (2) relationship-picker alias resolution — changes selectedIds:string[] prop to selectedItems:{id,alias?}[] with parent component updates for beat-form and beat-detail-lightbox. (3) Full alias pipeline: KnotRecord→Beat→WaveBeat→BeatDependency type additions, toBeat() mapping, listDependencies() enrichment via showKnot lookups, /api/waves alias passthrough, OpenAPI schema updates, and 7 view components updated to show alias??shortId. (4) Test coverage for toBeat, listDependencies enrichment, waves dep filter regression, and relationship-picker rendering. ~14 files, medium complexity.
